title: Third-Party Actions, Pinning, Dependency Trust, and Workflow CodeQL · Automation Case: Ci Action Full Sha Pin Update
summary: A workflow uses mutable tags from unknown publishers, executes a transitive action update without review, allows untrusted workflow edits, and has no inventory or emergency revocation path. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci action full sha pin update increment in action dependency and update policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin third-party actions to reviewed full commit SHAs, retain readable version comments, and automate reviewed update proposals.
Review action publisher, source, bundled code, runtime, inputs, outputs, token access, network behavior, post steps, advisories, and maintenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.

  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-action-full-sha-pin-update — Pin third-party actions to reviewed full commit SHAs, retain readable version comments, and automate reviewed update proposals.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-gha-actions-dependencies-supply-chain-5
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-actions-dependencies-supply-chain-5
    artifact: action-dependency-policy.yaml
    decision: worked gha actions dependencies supply chain 5
    environment: single-job ephemeral self-hosted runner in a segmented subnet
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      allowed-actions: reviewed-publishers
      third-party-pin: full-commit-sha
      version-comment: retained
      nested-inventory: generated
      effective-permissions: reviewed
      workflow-codeowners: delivery-security
      update: automated-pr-with-compat-tests
      analysis: codeql-actions-and-policy
      revocation: rehearsed
    verify: enumerate nested actions resolve immutable SHAs inspect bundled runtime inputs post steps permissions advisories and update evidence
    failure: Reject marketplace trust, mutable major tags, top-level-only inventory, general review assumptions, or static analysis as complete proof.
    repair: Review effective code and authority, pin immutable revisions, protect workflow changes, test updates, enforce policy, and rehearse removal.
